etymology.description: 木(木) (mù, "wood") + 二(二) (èr, "two") = two wooden pieces used as a peg
etymology.interpretation: The character 杙(yì, "peg") combines 木(木) (mù, "wood"), indicating the material, and 二(二) (èr, "two"), symbolizing the function of two pieces coming together, to convey the idea of a wooden peg or post.
